name: Set Up Tracking Domains in JetSend
body: [{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"text":"To know the maximum number of tracking domains you are eligible for, refer to your pricing plan."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The setup process includes:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Adding a domain"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Verifying the domain"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Adding a Domain","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Follow the steps below to add a domain as a link tracking domain:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Email Settings","bold":true},{"text":" page, in the "},{"text":"TRACKING DOMAINS","bold":true},{"text":" tab, click the "},{"text":"ADD A DOMAIN","bold":true},{"text":" button"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Enter a sub-domain of your sending domain and click ADD. The sub-domain is added with the status as Unverified."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the newly added sub-domain or select Verify Domain from the action menu (three dots) to see its CNAME information."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1NEMY8S3LXA6/tracking-domain.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1NEMY8S3LXA6/tracking-domain.png","name":"Tracking Domain.png","type":"image/png","size":35757,"width":936,"height":302,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F1NEMY8S3LXA6%2Ftracking-domain.png","mediaID":992,"dateInserted":"2025-10-06T17:14:01+00:00","insertUserID":5460,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"5460","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Verifying the Tracking Domain","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Only a verified domain can be used for tracking emails. Hence, you must verify the link tracking domain before you can start sending emails."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"CNAME","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"CNAME (Canonical Name Record) is a DNS record that is used to alias a domain name to a different domain name. It is useful when you want to direct users to the same information delivered on a separate URL."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Do the following to verify the CNAME of your link tracking domain:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to your domain’s DNS records."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In the DNS settings, add a record with CNAME as the record type."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Copy the CNAME hostname from the Domain Verification page in the JetSend application and paste it into the Label or Host field of the DNS record."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/O5807ZY5DWWC/cname-tracking-domain.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/O5807ZY5DWWC/cname-tracking-domain.png","name":"CNAME_Tracking_Domain.png","type":"image/png","size":61856,"width":936,"height":678,"displaySize":"medium","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FO5807ZY5DWWC%2Fcname-tracking-domain.png","mediaID":994,"dateInserted":"2025-10-06T17:14:45+00:00","insertUserID":5460,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"5460","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Copy the CNAME value from the Domain Verification page in the JetSend application and paste it into the Destination or Target field of the DNS record."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Then, back on the Domain Verification page, click "},{"text":"Verify CNAME RECORD","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
